name: 11q22_MMP_cluster
description: 11q22.2 matrix metalloproteinase gene cluster (MMP1, MMP3, MMP7, MMP8, MMP10, MMP12, MMP13, MMP20, MMP27). Eight tandemly arrayed paralogs in ~500 kb at 40-90% identity; site of common copy-number polymorphism and somatic amplification in tumours.

architecture.internal_structure: Nine MMP paralogs in tandem; coding homology 40-90%; intergenic SDs of 3-20 kb; MMP1-promoter -1607 indel widely studied as disease modifier.
